summary: Montgomery County Council legislative bills inventory. Columns include bill status, yeas, nays, enacted bill, executive action, veto override date, withdrawn date, sunset date, and Maryland Code chapter/section references.
Montgomery County public parking rates and locations. Columns include parking district, address, location, payment options, duration, parking rate, and council district.

Montgomery County capital improvement program (CIP) budget dataset for BudgetMontgomery. Columns include project name, project ID, fund, fund type, fiscal year, service area, category, recommended amount, and approved amount.

Montgomery County Public Libraries adolescent program attendance data updated annually. Columns include library branch, date, month, event type, age group, primary age group, attendance, published status, and internal notes.
Montgomery County nursing home locations. Columns include facility name, address, city, ZIP code, state, URL, and location.
Montgomery County Recreation spring open gym activities. Columns include recreation center name, activity type, address, city, ZIP code, phone number, age requirements, municipalities, and times.
Montgomery County golf course locations. Columns include course name, address, city, ZIP code, phone, info, latitude, and point coordinates.

Montgomery County OMB recommended versus approved operating budget comparison. Columns include department, program, cost center name, fund, fund type, expense category, expense type, fiscal year, recommended amount, and approved amount.

Montgomery County Recreation capital improvement program (CIP) budget data. Columns include fiscal year, dataset fiscal year, project, project ID, category, service, fund, fund type, recommended amount, and approved amount.
Montgomery County police station locations. Columns include station name, point coordinates, ZIP code, municipality, council district, community, and council.
Montgomery County Council zoning text amendments (ZTAs) inventory. Columns include action status, adopted date, effective date, public hearing date, worksession dates and reports.

Montgomery County procurement solicitation status data. Columns include solicitation number, description, status, department contact, issuance date, closing date, LSBRP designation, phone, and cancelled/postponed flag.
Montgomery County Free and Reduced-price Meals (FARMS) official school enrollment data for FY 2017. Columns include school center name and total FARMS enrollment count.

Montgomery County Rainscapes Rewards stormwater management project records. Columns include project ID, applicant name, structure detail, inspection region, account, project type, tree height, and MD 8-digit watershed code.

Montgomery County approved capital improvement program (CIP) budget data. Columns include fiscal year, dataset fiscal year, project, project ID, category, service, fund, fund type, recommended amount, and approved amount.
Montgomery County police district boundaries GIS dataset. Columns include object ID, district area, shape area, shape length, and geometry.

Montgomery County 2017 farm tour participant listing. Columns include farm location ZIP, community, council, council district, Saturday/Sunday hours, Sunday times, handicap parking availability, animals, and Christmas trees.
Montgomery County FY 2018 recommended fiscal revenues. Columns include fund, fund type, fiscal year, version, service, item category, description, and recommended amount.

Montgomery County 2021 commercial building energy benchmarking data. Columns include property type, largest use type, building square footage, postal code, city, land use category, electricity use in kWh, natural gas use in kBtu, and geo-location.
Montgomery County Council districts contact and staff information. Columns include council member name, email, staff, address, alerts, Facebook, YouTube, at-large status, and testify information.
Montgomery County Congressional district boundaries GIS dataset. Columns include Congressional district number, member name, website, phone, object ID, shape area, shape length, and geometry.

Montgomery County election precinct boundaries GIS dataset. Columns include precinct label, council district, congressional district, legislative district, DANDP code, created user, created date, last edited date, and geometry.
Montgomery County fire station response area boundaries GIS dataset. Columns include sector, object ID, shape area, shape length, and geometry.
Montgomery County places of worship locations GIS dataset. Columns include name, category, address, city, phone, URL, longitude, latitude, and geometry.
Montgomery County cemetery locations. Columns include name, category, address, city, ZIP code, phone, URL, latitude, longitude, and point coordinates.
Montgomery County urban district boundaries GIS dataset. Columns include district name, object ID, shape area, shape length, and geometry.
Montgomery County Metro (subway) station locations. Columns include station name, category, address, city, ZIP code, phone, URL, info, and geometry.

Montgomery County police station locations GIS dataset. Columns include full address, address number, unit, municipality, jurisdiction, entrance, CPN map label, location coordinates, and address status.
Montgomery County legislative district boundaries GIS dataset. Columns include district number, object ID, shape area, shape length, and geometry.
Montgomery County college and university locations GIS dataset. Columns include institution name, category, address, city, ZIP code, phone, URL, latitude, longitude, and geometry.
Montgomery County YMCA facility locations. Columns include facility name, address, city, ZIP code, phone, URL, info, latitude, longitude, and object ID.
Montgomery County parking facility locations GIS dataset. Columns include facility name, address, city, phone, URL, info, latitude, and point coordinates.
Montgomery County Health and Human Services (HHS) facility locations GIS dataset. Columns include facility name, category, address, info, URL, latitude, and point coordinates.
Montgomery County community boundary GIS dataset. Columns include community name, object ID, shape area, shape length, and geometry.
Montgomery County business park locations. Columns include park name, info, phone, URL, latitude, longitude, and point coordinates.
